headline: The Trade Desk Powers Open Internet Growth with DramaBox Short Drama Partnership
summary: The Trade Desk (Nasdaq: TTD), a global leader in advertising technology, today announced that it has become the first-ever demand-side platform (DSP) partner for vertical short drama platform DramaBox, enabling advertisers to programmatically incorporate this fast-growing open internet content environment into their omnichannel media strategies. The partnership spans markets worldwide, helping global advertisers to achieve more efficient, measurable, and scalable audience reach in an increasingl
